mapper.sql: KYC_ID, RNMCNO, KYC_TP_CCD, KYC_STS_CCD, ID_TP_CCD, ID_NO, ID_EXPIRE_DT, PURPOSE_CCD, FUND_SRC_CCD, PEP_F, BENEFICIAL_F, KYC_DT, NEXT_KYC_DT, REMARK, REG_ID, REG_DT, UPD_ID, UPD_DT
mapper.select: SELECT FROM KYC_CUST WHERE RNMCNO = #{custNo} ORDER BY REG_DT DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO KYC_CUST ( RNMCNO, KYC_TP_CCD, KYC_STS_CCD, ID_TP_CCD, ID_NO, ID_EXPIRE_DT, PURPOSE_CCD, FUND_SRC_CCD, PEP_F, BENEFICIAL_F, KYC_DT, NEXT_KYC_DT, REMARK, REG_ID, REG_DT ) VALUES ( #{custNo}, #{kycTpCd}, #{kycStCd}, #{idTpCd}, #{idNo}, #{idExpireDt}, #{purposeCd}, #{fundSrcCd}, #{pepYn}, #{beneficialYn}, #{kycDt}, #{nextKycDt}, #{remark}, #{regId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE KYC_CUST SET KYC_TP_CCD = #{kycTpCd}, KYC_STS_CCD = #{kycStCd}, ID_TP_CCD = #{idTpCd}, ID_NO = #{idNo}, ID_EXPIRE_DT = #{idExpireDt}, PURPOSE_CCD = #{purposeCd}, FUND_SRC_CCD = #{fundSrcCd}, PEP_F = #{pepYn}, BENEFICIAL_F = #{beneficialYn}, KYC_DT = #{kycDt}, NEXT_KYC_DT = #{nextKycDt}, REMARK = #{remark}, UPD_ID = #{updId}, UPD_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE KYC_ID = #{kycId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM KYC_CUST WHERE KYC_STS_CCD IN ('PENDING', 'IN_PROGRESS')
